conclusion: ยังสรุปไม่ได้
objective: Lock the next H-G1 strategy-ablation design before any NOVI/net-gamma filter test, so later PnL evidence cannot be shaped after seeing results.
design_principles: Risk-first: the study tries to falsify whether the signed-OI gamma proxy improves a strategy, not to find a nice-looking filter.
Chronological discipline: train, threshold fitting, and any selection occur before OOS evaluation.
Ablation discipline: every gamma-filtered variant is compared against the unfiltered quantitative baseline.
Implementation realism: mid PnL and implementable PnL must be reported separately.
Search honesty: every attempted variant is logged before any best-Sharpe claim.
allowed_input_artifacts: existing cached SPY bars, option quotes, OI statistics, and computed gamma proxy rows
existing Sub-System A ORB baseline rules and fills, if timestamp-aligned to the decision time
forbidden_before_results: new paid data justified solely by this preregistration
new gamma dates or OI files for this preregistered run
OOS threshold tuning after viewing validation results

baseline_variant.description: Existing timestamp-clean Sub-System A ORB quantitative rule with no gamma proxy filter.

gamma_variants.description: Skip otherwise valid baseline trades when the decision-time signed-OI gamma proxy is negative.
Skip otherwise valid baseline trades in the most negative train-fitted signed-OI gamma proxy tercile.
Allow otherwise valid baseline trades only when the decision-time signed-OI gamma proxy is positive.

selection_rule.primary_decision_basis: OOS implementable PnL and tail-risk improvement versus baseline, not best observed Sharpe alone.
candidate_can_advance_to_e2_only_if: OOS implementable PnL or tail metrics improve versus baseline without unacceptable trade-count collapse.
MinTRL/PSR labels do not mark the accepted claim under-sampled or underpowered, or the result is explicitly capped at E1 diagnostic.
DSR accounts for the complete trial count if a selected-best metric is reported.
Big-day dependency check survives after removing the most extreme 5% winning/losing trades or close days.
Cost drag is reported and does not erase the claimed edge.
Regime coverage is reported across volatility, macro/no-macro, train/OOS, and stress buckets where data exists.

tier_blockers: No implementable PnL or big-day dependency result yet
